events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: the missing static target-based calibration is a known corner-cut (substituting dynamic-only or clearing codes) that OEM position statements explicitly disallow when static cal is specified. Decision is `fail` with `critical` risk since it leaves AEB/lane-keep/ACC aim unverified; corrective actions require halting release and performing the proper OEM static calibration with a documented post-cal scan before the vehicle can proceed.
